channel.title: Federico Ramacciotti
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License.

item.title: Projects
item.description: Water Reminder This is the first program I made. It’s written entirely in Go and available for Linux and macOS. With this project I learned how to create and package a program, use libraries, and a new language. It is a top bar app that reminds you to drink every 15/30/45/60 minutes through notifications. Simple Tasks I made this program just for Linux (my daily driver) because I needed it during the Covid pandemic when we all had to so several meeting/lessons online.

item.title: About me
item.description: I am Federico Ramacciotti, Computer Science student at the University of Pisa and programmer. I’ve made two little projects by myself, Water Reminder and Simple Tasks, written in Go, a language that I learned by myself. Moreover, I made other projects for my Univerity, written in C, Java and a smaller one in OCaml. I’m still quite unexperienced but always ready to work and learn new things. In University I also learned a little bit of SQL.
